metric_value: Market described as adolescent — growing but lacking mature security solutions

metric_value: VPN is one of three essential capabilities for WLAN security

metric_value: Personal firewall is one of three essential capabilities for WLAN security

metric_name: WLAN security capability 3: Seamless WAP handoff
metric_value: Seamless hand-off between WAPs is one of three essential capabilities for WLAN security
notes: Third element of three-capability framework; session continuity as security requirement

metric_value: WEP insufficient for enterprise WLAN security; dedicated solutions required
notes: WEP's fundamental flaws already known in 2002; study's framework fills the gap

metric_value: Wi-Fi Alliance deprecated WEP in 2004; replaced by WPA/WPA2
notes: Study's implicit critique of WEP validated; WEP formally deprecated 2004
